title: ARI dashboard CheckpointSummary (GET /api/checkpoint/<id>/summary)
description: Response of GET /api/checkpoint/<id>/summary (checkpoint_api._api_checkpoint_summary, line 195). Mirrors frontend/src/types/index.ts CheckpointSummary (lines 237-264). In the found case the handler echoes 'id' and 'path' unconditionally (line 201) and adds the remaining keys (nodes_tree, paper_tex, has_pdf, review_report, science_data, figures_manifest, reproducibility_report, ors_*, vlm_review) only when the backing file exists — so only 'id'/'path' are 'required' here even though the TS interface (front-end-filled defaults) marks more. NOT-FOUND is the exact sentinel {"error": "not found"} (pinned by an equality assert in the test, not by this additive schema). 'nodes_tree.nodes[]' reuses viz_tree_node.schema.json.
